azure_insights_dashboard.name: Sigil API Production Dashboard
azure_insights_dashboard.description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Sigil API production environment

tiles.name: Request Volume
tiles.query: requests | summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart

tiles.name: Response Times
tiles.query: requests | summarize avg(duration), percentile(duration, 50), percentile(duration, 95), percentile(duration, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart
tiles.description: Average, P50, P95, P99 response times

tiles.name: Error Rate
tiles.query: requests | summarize success_rate = 100.0 * countif(success == true) / count(), error_rate = 100.0 * countif(success == false) / count() by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart
tiles.description: Success and error rates over time

tiles.name: Top Error Endpoints
tiles.query: requests | where success == false | summarize error_count = count() by url, resultCode | top 10 by error_count desc

tiles.name: Database Performance
tiles.query: dependencies | where type == 'SQL' | summarize avg(duration), percentile(duration, 95) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | render timechart

tiles.name: API Usage by Consumer
tiles.query: customMetrics | where name == 'api_usage_total' | extend consumer_type = tostring(customDimensions.consumer_type) | summarize usage = sum(value) by consumer_type
tiles.description: API usage breakdown by consumer type (human vs agent)

tiles.name: Security Alerts
tiles.query: customMetrics | where name == 'security_alerts_total' | extend alert_type = tostring(customDimensions.alert_type), severity = tostring(customDimensions.severity) | summarize alert_count = sum(value) by alert_type, severity | order by alert_count desc
tiles.description: Security alerts by type and severity

tiles.name: Tool Classifications
tiles.query: customMetrics | where name == 'tool_classifications_total' | extend category = tostring(customDimensions.category) | summarize classifications = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h), category | render timechart
tiles.description: Tool classifications over time by category

tiles.name: Health Check Status
tiles.query: requests | where url endswith '/health/detailed' | summarize latest = arg_max(timestamp, *) by url | project timestamp, url, resultCode, duration

tiles.name: Background Job Health
tiles.query: customMetrics | where name == 'background_jobs_status' | extend job_type = tostring(customDimensions.job_type), status = tostring(customDimensions.status) | summarize job_status = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 10m), job_type, status | render timechart

alerts.name: High Error Rate
alerts.condition: requests | summarize error_rate = 100.0 * countif(success == false) / count() | where error_rate > 5

alerts.name: High Response Time
alerts.condition: requests | summarize p95_duration = percentile(duration, 95) | where p95_duration > 2000
alerts.description: Alert when P95 response time exceeds 2 seconds

alerts.name: Database Connectivity
alerts.condition: requests | where url endswith '/health/detailed' and resultCode != 200 | count | where Count > 0

alerts.name: Security Alert Spike
alerts.condition: customMetrics | where name == 'security_alerts_total' | summarize alerts = sum(value) | where alerts > 10
alerts.description: Alert when security alerts spike above normal levels

prometheus_dashboard.name: Sigil API Prometheus Dashboard
prometheus_dashboard.description: Grafana dashboard configuration for Prometheus metrics
